intent_graph.goal: Delete a web service named '{{service_name}}' from the Render dashboard.

steps.intent: Locate the workspace or project section in the dashboard.
Focus on the search input field to prepare for typing.
Enter the name of the web service to search for it.
Scroll to ensure visibility of the target web service.
Navigate to the specific web service dashboard.
Scroll to locate the settings option for the web service.
Navigate to the settings page of the web service.
Scroll to find the option to delete the web service.
Initiate the deletion process by clicking the delete control.
Focus on the confirmation input field for deletion.
Enter the required confirmation text to proceed with deletion.
Confirm and submit the deletion request.
Verify the web service has been removed from the workspace.

decision_points.description: User must decide the exact name of the web service to search for.
User must confirm the correct web service is selected before proceeding.
User must ensure they intend to delete the web service before clicking the delete control.
User must enter the correct confirmation text to enable the deletion button.

expected_end_state.description: The '{{service_name}}' service is no longer listed in the workspace projects, and the dashboard reflects the updated list of services without the deleted one.
